name: Gingerbread Cream Pie -- George Washington
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and molasses; add unbeaten egg; blend well.
2. Add sifted dry ingredients alternately with milk; beat until smooth.
3. Pour batter into sprayed 9-inch round cake pan or springform.
4. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. When cool, remove from pan; split in half.
5. Prepare the filling: Soak gelatine in cold water for 10 minutes.
6. Heat milk to scalding in the top of a double boiler (or medium saucepan set into a large saucepan).
7. Stir in mixture of sugar, salt, and corn starch; cook in the top of the double boiler until the mixture begins to thicken.
8. Add vanilla and apricot to beaten egg, then add to the milk mixture in the double boiler.
9. When slightly thickened, stir in gelatine until dissolved.
10. Chill until the mixture jell (around 1¼ hour).
11. Spread filling between layers of gingerbread. If desired, top with whipped topping.
12. Serves 6-8.
